ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workforce_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the individuals (e.g., In post, Left) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individuals (e.g., 16-19) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individuals */,
  "organisation" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the individuals are located */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Headcount of individuals in this category */,
  "fte" REAL /* Full-time equivalent (FTE) count */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary of the individuals */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of the individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individuals */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the individuals */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individuals */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Full-time, Part-time) */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Number of years with the organization */,
  "promotion_count" INTEGER /* Number of promotions received */,
  "exit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for leaving if the status is 'Left' */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_data_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_data_ethnicity FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_data_organisation FOREIGN KEY ("organisation") REFERENCES organizations ("organisation_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Size category of the organization (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region for internal use */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or details about the ethnicity */,
  "subgroups" TEXT /* Specific subgroups within the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 16-19) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age within the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary report */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the report is related to */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary calculated for the organization */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary calculated for the organization */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the salary report was generated */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary in the organization */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary in the organization */,
  "std_dev_salary" REAL /* Standard deviation of salaries in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_reports_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organisation_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data entry
